rcm_process_flow.description: Revenue Cycle Management process stages from patient encounter to payment

stages.name: Patient Registration & Eligibility
stages.description: Verify patient demographics, insurance eligibility, and benefits before service delivery

stages.name: Prior Authorization
stages.description: Obtain required authorizations from payers before rendering services

stages.name: Charge Capture & Coding
stages.description: Capture charges for services rendered and assign appropriate CPT/ICD-10 codes

stages.name: Claim Submission
stages.description: Submit clean claims to payers electronically via clearinghouse

stages.name: Payment Posting & Reconciliation
stages.description: Post payments, adjustments, and denials from ERA/EOB remittances

stages.name: Denial Management & Appeals
stages.description: Work denied claims through root cause analysis, correction, and appeal submission

stages.name: A/R Follow-up & Collections
stages.description: Follow up on unpaid claims, manage aging buckets, and escalate to collections

common_denial_reasons.description: Top 10 CARC (Claim Adjustment Reason Codes) causing denials

codes.name: MISSING_INFO
codes.description: Claim/service lacks information or has submission/billing error(s)

codes.name: CODING_MISMATCH
codes.description: The procedure code is inconsistent with the modifier used or a required modifier is missing

codes.name: TIMELY_FILING
codes.description: The time limit for filing has expired

codes.name: MEDICAL_NECESSITY
codes.description: The impact of this claim/service on the patient's condition warrants further review

codes.name: NOT_COVERED
codes.description: These are non-covered services because this is not deemed a medical necessity

codes.name: BUNDLING
codes.description: This service/equipment/drug is not covered under the patient benefit plan

codes.name: CONTRACTUAL_ADJUSTMENT
codes.description: Charge exceeds fee schedule/maximum allowable or contracted/legislated fee

payer_behavior_profiles.description: Top 5 payers with typical behavior metrics

root_cause_categories.description: Root cause taxonomy for denial analysis

categories.name: CODING_ERROR
categories.description: Incorrect CPT/ICD-10 code assignment, modifier errors, or code mismatch between diagnosis and procedure

categories.name: ELIGIBILITY_LAPSE
categories.description: Patient coverage terminated, inactive policy, or benefits exhausted before service date

categories.name: AUTH_MISSING
categories.description: Required prior authorization not obtained or expired before service rendered

categories.name: TIMELY_FILING
categories.description: Claim submitted after payer-specific filing deadline

categories.name: DOCUMENTATION_GAP
categories.description: Insufficient clinical documentation to support medical necessity or level of service

categories.name: PAYER_POLICY_CHANGE
categories.description: Payer updated coverage policy, fee schedule, or billing requirements without adequate notice

categories.name: PATIENT_DATA_ERROR
categories.description: Incorrect patient demographics, insurance ID, or subscriber information on claim

automation_rules.description: Current automation rules in the NEXUS RCM system

rules.name: Auto-Resubmit Missing Info
rules.trigger: denial_code = 'CO-16' AND missing_field IS NOT NULL
rules.action: Populate missing field from patient record and resubmit

rules.name: Duplicate Claim Detector
rules.trigger: claim matches existing by (patient_id, service_date, cpt_code, payer_id)
rules.action: Flag as potential duplicate and prevent submission

rules.name: Eligibility Pre-Check
rules.action: Run real-time 270/271 eligibility check before submission

rules.name: Timely Filing Alert
rules.action: Escalate to priority queue with countdown timer

rules.name: Coding Validation
rules.trigger: pre_submission AND (cpt_code, icd10_code) pair NOT IN valid_combinations
rules.action: Flag for coder review with suggested corrections

rules.name: Auth Expiry Monitor
rules.action: Alert scheduling team and initiate re-authorization request

rules.name: Appeal Auto-Generation
rules.trigger: denial AND appeal_eligible AND denial_category IN ('CODING_MISMATCH', 'MEDICAL_NECESSITY')
rules.action: Generate appeal letter with supporting documentation references
